Rule.name: CNC_RME_BulkUpload_Template_Download
Rule.Description: Builds bulk-upload CSV template metadata or role attribute definition metadata for IT or Business roles.

Argument.name: context
Argument.Description: A sailpoint.api.SailPointContext object that can be used to query the database if necessary.

Argument.name: roleType
Argument.Description: Role type for the template: "it" or "business".

Argument.name: templateType
Argument.Description: Template to build: "bulk" (upload template) or "attributeDefinition" (attribute reference CSV).

Argument.name: loggedInUser
Argument.Description: Name of the identity downloading the template (used for RMEAdministrator check).
